title: Isuzu Launches First Electric Pickup in UK Market
detail: Isuzu has launched its first electric pickup truck — the D-Max EV — in the UK market, expanding the EV commercial vehicle segment into the competitive pickup category. The vehicle targets fleet and commercial buyers but carries a premium price point compared to its diesel counterparts, reflecting ongoing battery cost challenges for larger working vehicles. The launch marks a significant step for Isuzu as it electrifies its core product line.

media.caption: Isuzu D-Max EV electric pickup truck launched in the UK market
